name: Straight Shots Golf
about: Straight Shots Golf is an indoor golf simulator facility providing 24/7 access to golfers year-round. They utilize premium Trackman simulator technology for swing and ball flight analysis. The venue offers flexible membership options with rollover benefits and per-hour pricing, catering to golfers seeking consistent practice and play without long-term commitments. Members receive 10 free simulator hours each month, with additional time available at $30 per hour. The facility is designed for convenience and value, allowing for online booking and featuring a casual, modern environment focused on the golf experience.
why_golfers_like_it: 24/7 access to play all year round
Premium Trackman simulator technology for precise swing and ball data
Flexible membership plans with rollover hours for maximum value
Simple, no-contract pricing model with low hourly rates

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium launch monitor system for swing and ball flight analysis

faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, and no specific BYOB policy is stated. Bringing your own items should be confirmed with the venue directly.
